verifier_input.doc_snippet: One of the most widely used high-strength alloys in aerospace, automotive, and defence industries due to its high-strength-to-weight ratio, good fatigue behaviour and very high machinability is aluminium alloy AA7075-T6. There has been a massive transition towards lightweight materials in the global manufacturing environment due to the need to conserve energy, reduce emissions, and sustainability requirements, particularly in aerospace and electric vehicle applications. Therefore, AA7075-T6 remains a subject of much research, especially in advanced machining and hybrid processing, as well as optimization of surface integrity.
